## Checklist

- [ ] Full CI passes: `pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm docs:check && pnpm test && pnpm build`
- [ ] Tests added/updated for changed behavior
- [ ] No untagged claims — all capabilities labeled `CURRENT`/`PARTIAL`/`PLANNED`
- [ ] No new dependencies without justification
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`type(scope): description`)
- [ ] Architectural boundaries respected (dependency direction: core <- policy/replay <- cli)
- [ ] Package-level CLAUDE.md updated if public API changed
- [ ] Schema changes include spec + fixture + test updates
